dcgm_support.description: Enable or disable NVIDIA DCGM (Data Center GPU Manager) on GPU compute nodes. When true, nvidia-dcgm.service is started during cloud-init provisioning. Default: true

ldms_agg_port.description: LDMS Aggregator port on service k8s cluster. Valid range: 6001-6100. Default: 6001

ldms_store_port.description: LDMS store daemon port on service k8s cluster. Valid range: 6001-6100. Can be the same as ldms_agg_port (isolated by pod). Default: 6001

ldms_sampler_port.description: LDMS sampler port on compute nodes. Valid range: 10001-10100. Default: 10001

powerscale_telemetry_support.description: Enable or disable PowerScale telemetry support. Requires csi_driver_powerscale in software_config.json.

powerscale_log_enabled.description: Enable or disable PowerScale log collection (syslog to VictoriaLogs). Requires powerscale_telemetry_support: true.

otel_collector_storage_size.description: PVC size for OTEL Collector metric batching and buffering.

csm_observability_values_file_path.description: Path to the user-provided Helm values file for karavi-observability chart. Required when powerscale_telemetry_support is true.

tls_insecure_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for this endpoint.

additional_remote_write_endpoints.description: Additional VictoriaMetrics remote_write endpoints. vmagent writes to all configured endpoints.

anyOf.description: LDMS sampler configurations can be null if no LDMS monitoring is needed

plugin_name.description: Name of the LDMS sampler plugin. Must be one of the 6 supported plugin types: meminfo (memory usage), procstat2 (process statistics), vmstat (virtual memory), loadavg (system load), slurm_sampler (HPC workload monitoring), procnetdev2 (network interface statistics). Cannot be empty.

errorMessage.enum: Invalid plugin_name. Only 6 plugins are supported: meminfo, procstat2, vmstat, loadavg, slurm_sampler, procnetdev2
errorMessage.minLength: plugin_name cannot be empty. Must be one of: meminfo, procstat2, vmstat, loadavg, slurm_sampler, procnetdev2

config_parameters.description: Plugin-specific configuration parameters represented as a single string (e.g., 'component_id=2 stream=slurm job_count=8 task_count=8')

activation_parameters.description: Activation parameters as a string (e.g., 'interval=1000000 offset=0'). Format: 'interval=<microseconds>' with optional 'offset=<microseconds>' separated by space.
activation_parameters.errorMessage: Must be in format 'interval=<non-zero-number>' or 'interval=<non-zero-number> offset=<number>'. Example: 'interval=1000000' or 'interval=1000000 offset=0'

config_parameters.description: Must include component_id, stream, job_count, and task_count in the string
Optional comma-separated list of network interfaces (e.g., 'ifaces=eth0,eth1')

name.description: CONSTANT: Fixed topic names that cannot be changed. Only 'idrac' and 'ldms' are allowed.

errorMessage.enum: Invalid topic name. Only 'idrac' and 'ldms' are allowed as Kafka topic names. Custom topic names are not supported.

partitions.description: Number of partitions for the topic (1-100). This is the only configurable parameter.

required.name: Topic 'name' is required and must be one of: 'idrac', 'ldms'
required.partitions: Topic 'partitions' is required and must be between 1-100

topic_partitions.description: IMPORTANT: At least one Kafka topic must be defined. Topic names 'idrac' and 'ldms' are CONSTANTS. 'idrac' is required if idrac_telemetry_support is true and kafka is in telemetry_collection_type. 'ldms' is required if LDMS software is configured in software_config.json (automatic detection). Only partition counts can be changed.

errorMessage.minItems: At least 1 Kafka topic must be defined. Configure based on enabled features.
errorMessage.uniqueItems: Each topic (idrac, ldms) must appear only once

victoria_logs_configurations.description: VictoriaLogs cluster mode configuration. Deployed alongside VictoriaMetrics when 'victoria' is in collection type.

storage_size.description: Storage size per vlstorage replica PVC. Total = storage_size x 3 replicas.
storage_size.errorMessage: storage_size must be a valid Kubernetes PVC size (e.g., '8Gi', '50Gi', '1Ti')
